questions.question: Describe the process by which an image is formed in a camera. Explain the role of the lens and the image sensor in this process. (5 marks)
State the formula for the relationship between the intensity of a light source and the brightness of the image formed on a photodiode. (5 marks)
Explain how the light intensity in an image changes as the angle of view of the camera changes. Use a diagram to support your explanation. (10 marks)
